short: A hypothetical system whose abilities would far exceed the best humans in nearly every field.
definition: Artificial superintelligence describes a hypothetical system whose cognitive abilities would greatly surpass the best human experts in nearly every field, including scientific creativity, strategy, and social intelligence. It is a speculative concept, discussed mainly in the context of long-term AI safety and alignment rather than as a near-term product. No such system exists, and its possibility and timeline remain debated.
